Create a Paper

Enter a title, paste your questions and answer key, then save.

@if (form.get('titleInput')?.touched && form.get('titleInput')?.invalid) { Paper title is required. }
Each question block: number + question text, then A) B) C) D) options, separated by a blank line. @if (form.get('questionsInput')?.touched && form.get('questionsInput')?.invalid) { Questions are required. }
Provide answers as A/B/C/D — one per line or comma-separated. @if (form.get('answerKeyInput')?.touched && form.get('answerKeyInput')?.invalid) { Answer key is required. }
@if (errorMessage) {
{{ errorMessage }}
}
